## Install / Upgrade
```bash
npm install -g proj-track@[VERSION]
```

## Quick Example
```bash
cd ~/my-project
proj-track init
source ~/.bashrc

# Just work normally — commands are captured automatically!
npm run build
git push origin main

proj-track list
```
